_description: DogFoodAndFun content blueprint — reverse-engineered from live posts. Shared reference for all content creation skills.

structure.format: Affiliate disclosure: Amazon affiliate links. Purchases support this site at no extra cost to you.

structure.description: Personal story with Nalla — a specific problem, scenario, or experience that leads into the topic
patterns: Nalla doing something relatable (eating off the street, pulling on leash, hiding under sofa)
Engineer framing: 'As an engineer, I approach X with the same rigor as Y'

structure.description: Why this topic matters — the gap in existing content, the frustration, the research rabbit hole
H2/H3 structured educational sections with data, comparisons, and specifics
Table comparing 3-6 products with price, specs, pros/cons
'Beyond X' or 'Alternatives' — 3-6 additional products/approaches beyond main picks
3-6 common questions with schema.org FAQ markup
3-6 internal links to other dogfoodandfun.com posts
structure.format: For more insights on [topic], check out our [post title] guide.

title_patterns: {Product A} vs. {Product B}: A Dog {Category} Comparison

year_tag.note: Include current year in title or section headers for SEO freshness

target_audience.note: All content, products, pricing, and availability must target USA/Canada audience. Use USD pricing, US-available brands, and North American retail links (Amazon.com, Chewy, etc.).

tone_markers: Technical metaphors (diagnostic, feature/bug, spec sheet, system architecture)
Nalla as living test subject with real specific behaviors
Casual but data-driven (let's be honest, in our experience)
Affiliate disclosure always present, never pushy
must_include: At least one specific Nalla behavior per section
At least 3 concrete numbers/data points per section
must_avoid: Sales language (check out our website, buy now, our product)
Generic praise (great post, love this, awesome)
Absolute health claims (this will cure, this is the best)

seo.heading_hierarchy: H1 (title) → H2 (sections) → H3 (subsections), never skip levels
seo.image_alt_text: Descriptive, include keyword, mention Nalla if relevant

facebook.format: Hook line → Personal story → Key insight → Question for community
facebook.link_placement: In post body (under 50K group) or first comment (over 50K group)

instagram.format: Hook → Story snippet → Key takeaway → 'Link in bio' → Hashtags
instagram.image_source: Pexels API landscape search using post keywords

reel_script.tone: Spoken, conversational, as if talking to camera

affiliate.disclosure_text: Affiliate disclosure: Amazon affiliate links. Purchases support this site at no extra cost to you.
affiliate.honest_note: Full disclosure: the links above are Amazon affiliate links tagged with my Associates ID. If you buy through them, I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you. I only list products I'd genuinely consider for Nalla.

publishing_coordination._description: Rules for timing and sequencing posts across platforms to avoid algorithm penalties and maximize reach.

posting_windows._note: All times in USA/Canada EST — target audience peak hours. Israel time = EST + 7h.

facebook_page.label: Weekday mornings 8-10am EST (3-5pm Israel)
facebook_page.reason: FB page reach peaks during morning commute/coffee scroll

instagram_feed.label: Weekday evenings 6-8pm EST (1-3am Israel, schedule ahead)
instagram_feed.reason: IG engagement peaks after work hours

facebook_groups.label: Midday 11am-2pm EST (6-9pm Israel)
facebook_groups.reason: Group activity peaks during lunch break, also gives page post time to breathe

sequencing._note: Page post first (morning). IG same day evening. Groups 3+ hours after page post. Never post FB page and IG within 4 hours.

quality_gates._description: Every generated caption/post MUST pass these checks before being sent for Telegram approval.
validation_flow: 2. Run brand voice validation (blocked terms, required elements)
3. If violations found → auto-fix and re-validate (max 2 retries)
4. If still failing → flag for manual review in Telegram message
5. Only send to Telegram approval if validation passes or is flagged

idea_generation._description: Rules for the content-ideator skill to generate new post ideas.
sources: Content gaps from site_content_cache.json (categories with no recent posts)
Trending topics from Instagram hashtags in niche
Facebook group discussions (questions without good answers)
Google 'People Also Ask' for existing target keywords
Seasonal/timely topics (summer cooling, winter nutrition, holiday safety)

idea_schema.Nalla_Context: Personal angle — specific Nalla experience to lead with
idea_schema.Post_Goal: What the reader should learn/do after reading

diversity_rules.category_balance_per_month: At least 1 from each active category
